hero.title: Daoud Khan — Governor of the Nestorians
hero.subtitle: From Georgian officer to Sartip of Shiraz and Isfahan; the 1845 mandate over the Nestorian Christians of Urumia at British, Russian, and royal instance; and the mission politics that turned his office into a battlefield between protection and extraction.

pages.alt: 19th-century lithograph — wide view of Tabriz with domes, minarets, and mountains on the horizon
